name: Orange Money Africa Mobile Money API
what_it_does: Orange Money REST API (Orange Money Webpay) for businesses in West and Central Africa to accept mobile money payments from Orange Money subscribers through Orange's telecom-integrated mobile wallet across Senegal, Côte d'Ivoire, Mali, Cameroon, Guinea, and 14 other African markets, enabling merchant payment collection, disbursement, and bulk payment for Orange's 50M+ mobile money users in French-speaking Africa. Enables AI agents to manage merchant payment initiation for West Africa Orange Money checkout automation, handle bulk disbursement for Africa payroll and NGO benefit payment automation, access payment status confirmation for West Africa transaction automation, retrieve transaction history for Africa payment analytics automation, manage webhook notification for Orange Money payment event automation, handle refund processing for West Africa payment reversal automation, access account balance for Orange Money business management automation, retrieve customer Orange Money status for Africa subscriber verification automation, and integrate Orange Money with West African e-commerce, NGO, microfinance, and enterprise platforms for end-to-end French-speaking West and Central Africa mobile money automation.
use_cases: Collecting Orange Money payments for Senegal and Mali merchant checkout agents
Disbursing bulk payments to Orange Money wallets from West Africa payroll agents
Confirming Orange Money transactions from West Africa fulfillment agents
Verifying Orange Money subscriber status from Africa payment validation agents
not_for: Non-Orange Money subscribers (Orange Money serves Orange telecom customers; use MTN MoMo for MTN subscribers)
Non-Africa markets (Orange Money is Africa/Middle East focused)
High-value international transfers (Orange Money is for sub-$500 mobile wallet transactions)
best_when: An NGO, enterprise, or merchant in Francophone West or Central Africa wanting AI agents to automate mobile money collection and disbursement through Orange Money's network of 50M+ users across 17 African markets.
avoid_when: ORANGE MONEY DEVELOPER PORTAL REGISTRATION REQUIRED: Orange Money API access requires developer portal registration and application approval per country; automated self-service access requires portal approval; automated standalone API access without approval creates unauthorized. CONSUMER USSD AUTHENTICATION FOR COLLECTION: Orange Money payment collection initiates USSD *144# prompt on consumer's phone; automated checkout must inform consumer to approve on phone; automated server-side collection without consumer USSD action creates no payment authorization. COUNTRY-SPECIFIC APIs: Orange Money has separate API configurations and endpoints per country; automated multi-country deployment must use country-specific API and credentials; automated single API for all Orange Africa countries creates wrong_country error. BULK DISBURSEMENT HAS APPROVAL PROCESS: Orange Money bulk disbursement above thresholds requires additional approval; automated bulk payout must account for approval step; automated immediate bulk disbursement without approval workflow creates hold for manual review.

auth.notes: Orange Money uses OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON. Paris, France HQ (Orange Group) with Africa subsidiary. Products: Orange Money Webpay (merchant API), Orange Money Express, Orange Cash, Orange Bank Africa. No public SDK. Regulated in 17 African countries under BCEAO (West Africa), BEAC (Central Africa). 50M+ mobile money users. Competes with MTN MoMo and Wave in French-speaking Africa.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox free via developer portal; production requires Orange Money commercial agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction collection fee 1-2.5% depending on country and volume; disbursement fees negotiated
pricing.notes: Paris FR / Africa. Orange Group. Per-transaction pricing in local currency. BCEAO/BEAC regulated.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app per country; collection and disbursement APIs throttled; callback-based async

known_agent_gotchas: USSD-BASED CONSUMER AUTHENTICATION: Orange Money payment initiates USSD prompt (*144#) on consumer phone; automated checkout flow must instruct consumer to complete USSD; automated server-side charge expectation without USSD creates no payment authorization and timeout

COUNTRY-SPECIFIC ENDPOINTS AND CREDENTIALS: Orange Money has separate developer apps and OAuth credentials per country; automated multi-country must register and configure per country; automated single credential for all Orange Africa creates auth failure for non-primary country

PAYMENT RESULT DELIVERED VIA CALLBACK: Orange Money payment result is delivered to notifUrl (callback); automated workflow must use callback URL; automated polling-only implementation creates delayed awareness of payment status

DEVELOPER PORTAL APPROVAL IS MANUAL: Orange Money developer portal app approval is manual and may take days; automated self-service integration timeline must include approval wait; automated immediate production access assumption after registration creates prolonged blocked integration

ACCESS TOKEN IS SHORT-LIVED: Orange Money OAuth access token has short TTL; automated integration must refresh token before expiry; automated static long-lived token assumption creates expired_token_error for long-running workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: West Africa mobile money. BCEAO/BEAC regulated. OAuth2. Africa. Mobile wallet and transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: West Africa mobile money. BCEAO, BEAC. OAuth2. Africa. Mobile wallet data.
